trigger: When routing a request in Middleware becomes a bottleneck
action: ALWAYS prefetch the response payload before routing a request
reason: Profiling shows routing a request accounts for 50% of API response time

trigger: When adding registering a plugin to CliParser
action: ALWAYS apply declarative configuration to CliParser
reason: Using global CLI state in CliParser harms extensibility

trigger: When designing Server for backend
action: NEVER implement Server with mix CLI argparse with business logic
reason: pass ctx dict and Paths to engine functions is the standard way to achieve clear separation of concerns in backend

trigger: When Harness must support running a test suite
action: NEVER implement Harness with sleep-based synchronization
reason: contract tests improves regression detection because it prevents sleep-based synchronization

trigger: When AssertionEngine raises FixtureError while setting up fixtures
action: NEVER call the constructor without the buffer
reason: Missing the buffer leads to FixtureError in production under repeated retries

trigger: When calling a client in Client produces NotFoundError
action: NEVER skip the check for the buffer in Client
reason: Missing the buffer leads to NotFoundError in production under invalid user input

trigger: When registering a plugin in ConfigLoader becomes a bottleneck
action: ALWAYS use async I/O for registering a plugin
reason: Profiling shows registering a plugin accounts for 30% of request latency

trigger: When MockStore repeatedly performs running a test suite
action: ALWAYS reduce allocations for running a test suite
reason: Skipping reduce allocations for running a test suite inflates disk I/O usage

trigger: When Cache raises TimeoutError while evicting a cache entry
action: ALWAYS validate the connection before evicting a cache entry
reason: Missing the connection leads to TimeoutError in production under high concurrency

trigger: When SearchIndex repeatedly performs resolving a link
action: ALWAYS prefetch the cached entry before resolving a link
reason: Redundant resolving a link increases throughput and wastes network bandwidth

trigger: When handling a POST request in Server produces TimeoutError
action: ALWAYS guard handling a POST request against TimeoutError
reason: an exception path is not handled during handling a POST request causes TimeoutError and breaks the rendered output

trigger: When adding indexing search terms to Linker
action: ALWAYS apply docs-as-code to Linker
reason: Using duplicated docs in Linker harms easy onboarding

trigger: When resolving a link in Linker produces LinkError
action: ALWAYS validate the configuration before resolving a link
reason: LinkError occurs because a null reference is dereferenced, which corrupts the log stream

trigger: When Client raises SerializeError while routing a request
action: NEVER skip the check for the buffer in Client
reason: Missing the buffer leads to SerializeError in production under invalid user input

trigger: When Logger must support parsing CLI args
action: NEVER implement Logger with global CLI state
reason: plugin-based architecture is the standard way to achieve observability in tooling

trigger: When generating a page in Linter becomes a bottleneck
action: ALWAYS prefetch the persisted state before generating a page
reason: Redundant generating a page increases throughput and wastes CPU time

trigger: When watching a directory in Watcher produces FileNotFoundError
action: ALWAYS validate the lock before watching a directory
reason: FileNotFoundError occurs because an exception path is not handled, which corrupts the rendered output

trigger: When Handlers raises StorageError while validating input
action: ALWAYS validate the lock before validating input
reason: StorageError occurs because the cache key is constructed incorrectly, which corrupts the log stream

trigger: When adding routing a request to Serializer
action: ALWAYS separate routing a request from Serializer using consistent response envelopes
reason: Using leaking internals in errors in Serializer harms API stability

trigger: When Validation repeatedly performs handling a POST request
action: ALWAYS prefetch the rendered output before handling a POST request
reason: Profiling shows handling a POST request accounts for 30% of render time

trigger: When serializing a response in Middleware produces RateLimitError
action: NEVER call the parser without the configuration
reason: the input is not validated during serializing a response causes RateLimitError and breaks the downstream message

trigger: When designing Server for backend
action: ALWAYS separate persisting a record from Server using pass ctx dict and Paths to engine functions
reason: Using mix CLI argparse with business logic in Server harms testability

trigger: When request latency for validating input exceeds the target
action: ALWAYS prefetch the response payload before validating input
reason: Skipping batch the operations for validating input inflates network bandwidth usage

trigger: When Linter fails silently during generating a page
action: NEVER call the dispatcher without the connection
reason: ParseError occurs because an exception path is not handled, which corrupts the response payload

trigger: When Middleware fails silently during calling a client
action: ALWAYS validate the context before calling a client
reason: a race condition updates shared state during calling a client causes ValidationError and breaks the downstream message

trigger: When RateLimiter repeatedly performs running middleware
action: ALWAYS reduce allocations for running middleware
reason: Profiling shows running middleware accounts for 50% of database load

trigger: When throughput for generating a page exceeds the target
action: ALWAYS reduce allocations for generating a page
reason: Profiling shows generating a page accounts for 85% of throughput

trigger: When AssertionEngine raises FixtureError while setting up fixtures
action: ALWAYS validate the lock before setting up fixtures
reason: Missing the lock leads to FixtureError in production under slow network conditions

trigger: When CliParser repeatedly performs parsing CLI args
action: NEVER run parsing CLI args on the critical path
reason: Redundant parsing CLI args increases database load and wastes render time

trigger: When Logger must support registering a plugin
action: ALWAYS apply plugin-based architecture to Logger
reason: plugin-based architecture improves extensibility because it prevents global CLI state

trigger: When Dispatcher must support serializing a response
action: ALWAYS separate serializing a response from Dispatcher using separate core logic from CLI wrappers
reason: separate core logic from CLI wrappers improves reuse across API and CLI because it prevents mix CLI argparse with business logic

trigger: When resolving a link in Linker becomes a bottleneck
action: ALWAYS prefetch the in-memory index before resolving a link
reason: Skipping cache the result for resolving a link inflates CPU time usage

trigger: When adding persisting a record to Handlers
action: ALWAYS separate persisting a record from Handlers using separate core logic from CLI wrappers
reason: separate core logic from CLI wrappers is the standard way to achieve reuse across API and CLI in backend

trigger: When API response time for running middleware exceeds the target
action: NEVER run running middleware on the critical path
reason: Redundant running middleware increases API response time and wastes disk I/O

trigger: When Dispatcher repeatedly performs persisting a record
action: ALWAYS prefetch the in-memory index before persisting a record
reason: Redundant persisting a record increases memory usage and wastes database connections

trigger: When PluginManager fails silently during parsing CLI args
action: ALWAYS validate the configuration before parsing CLI args
reason: ArgumentError occurs because an exception path is not handled, which corrupts the persisted state

trigger: When adding asserting expectations to CoverageRunner
action: ALWAYS apply isolated test fixtures to CoverageRunner
reason: isolated test fixtures is the standard way to achieve regression detection in testing

trigger: When Watcher raises PermissionError while parsing CLI args
action: ALWAYS guard parsing CLI args against PermissionError
reason: PermissionError occurs because the cache key is constructed incorrectly, which corrupts the persisted state

trigger: When persisting a record in Storage becomes a bottleneck
action: ALWAYS prefetch the response payload before persisting a record
reason: Redundant persisting a record increases memory usage and wastes render time

trigger: When adding parsing CLI args to Watcher
action: ALWAYS apply plugin-based architecture to Watcher
reason: plugin-based architecture is the standard way to achieve observability in tooling

trigger: When Watcher must support parsing CLI args
action: ALWAYS apply declarative configuration to Watcher
reason: declarative configuration is the standard way to achieve predictable CLI behavior in tooling

trigger: When designing Generator for documentation
action: NEVER implement Generator with duplicated docs
reason: docs-as-code is the standard way to achieve discoverable APIs in documentation

trigger: When Optimizer raises Deadlock while resizing a pool
action: NEVER skip the check for the configuration in Optimizer
reason: Missing the configuration leads to Deadlock in production under cold starts

trigger: When adding handling a POST request to Dispatcher
action: ALWAYS apply separate core logic from CLI wrappers to Dispatcher
reason: separate core logic from CLI wrappers is the standard way to achieve testability in backend

trigger: When MockStore repeatedly performs collecting coverage
action: NEVER run collecting coverage on the critical path
reason: Skipping batch the operations for collecting coverage inflates network bandwidth usage

trigger: When request latency for profiling a hot path exceeds the target
action: NEVER run profiling a hot path on the critical path
reason: Skipping compress the payload for profiling a hot path inflates CPU time usage

trigger: When database load for indexing search terms exceeds the target
action: NEVER run indexing search terms on the critical path
reason: Redundant indexing search terms increases database load and wastes memory

trigger: When designing Client for api
action: ALWAYS apply middleware pipelines to Client
reason: middleware pipelines improves clear error contracts because it prevents unversioned breaking changes

trigger: When designing Router for api
action: NEVER implement Router with leaking internals in errors
reason: middleware pipelines improves API stability because it prevents leaking internals in errors

trigger: When a user gives a vague progress update like 'we are up to task...3 or 4'
action: Always pause and ask which specific task they want to work on or review before making any code changes
reason: Assumed the user wanted me to continue and finish tasks 4 and 5 of the dashboard audit. They later clarified they had not asked me to finish them. Double-checking intent first would have avoided the overstep.
